creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-05-23 14:07:58 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    databases            Makefile 
  Added files:
    databases/sqliteman  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  sqliteman is the best developer's and/or admin's GUI tool for
  Sqlite3 in the world. No joking here (or just a bit only).It
  contains the most complette feature set of all tools available.
  And much more , it's available for all major platforms, and
  it's free.
  
  WWW:    http://sqliteman.sf.net/
  
  PR:             ports/134733
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.773     +1 -0      ports/databases/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/databases/sqliteman/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/databases/sqliteman/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/databases/sqliteman/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +134 -0    ports/databases/sqliteman/pkg-plist (new)
